title: Homyatos' Explosives
description: This mod will add powerful explosives such as C4 and a mine. You will be able to mine some building, or on the contrary to defuse.
body:
## Fully supports Russian (Primary) and English.
This mod will add powerful explosives such as C4 and a mine. You will be able to mine some building, or on the contrary to defuse. The mod is perfect for role-playing games or just for fun.

 

_The C4 code is written in the lore field of the item._
